content:
# Graphene Oxide

**Summary**: A form of graphene that has oxygen-containing functional groups, used as a catalyst.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] used graphene oxide to enhance the degradation of phenol.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] Used to improve the efficiency of phenol removal in water.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] Synthesized via Hummers method and characterized by FTIR/XRD.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Characterized via FTIR and XRD after synthesis using Hummers method. ([[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015, p. 104]])
